Headline: #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express Temporary Northbound Reroute near Michigan/Ida B Well
ShortDescription: Northbound 147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express buses are temp. rerouted via Congress Plaza, Ida B Well, Michigan, Van Buren and State near Michigan/Ida B Well.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Congress Plaza, Ida B Well, Michigan, Van Buren and State due to, street blockage near Michigan/Ida B Well.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #92 Foster, #93 California/Dodge Temporary Reroute at Foster/California
ShortDescription: 92 Foster, 93 California/Dodge buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, police activity near Foster/California.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#92 Foster, #93 California/Dodge buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, police activity near Foster/California.
